def eligible_for_massage_therapy_license(self)-> bool:
        is_gender_eligible = self.gender.lower() in ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        is_age_eligible = self.age >= 18
        is_race_eligible = self.race.lower() in ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        is_employment_status_eligible = self.employment_status.lower() in ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        is_education_eligible = self.education.lower() in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        is_marital_status_eligible = self.marital_status.lower() in ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        is_religion_eligible = self.religion.lower() in ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        is_training_hours_completed = self.training_hours_completed >= 500
        
        return (is_gender_eligible and is_age_eligible and is_race_eligible and
                is_employment_status_eligible and is_education_eligible and
                is_marital_status_eligible and is_religion_eligible and
                is_training_hours_completed)
